summary: Classified the live PR inventory shard independently. No GitHub mutations, close actions, merge actions, or fix artifacts are planned because this job disables instant close, low-signal close, merge, fix, and raise_pr. The validator identified #93567 as security-sensitive, so that exact PR is routed to central OpenClaw security handling while unrelated PRs remain non-mutating inventory classifications.
